title: Stabilize generated temp names across macro-only std changes
description: Snapshot updates currently churn Haxe-generated __hx suffixes when macro/std helper code changes, even when emitted Ruby semantics are unchanged. Investigate deterministic temp naming or snapshot normalization so unrelated macro additions do not ripple through runtime snapshots.

title: Package hxruby runtime as a Ruby gem
description: The PRD recommends shipping hxruby as a Ruby gem for Rails integration. The current 1.0 path ships the runtime in the Haxelib package and generated/vendored output, but there is no hxruby.gemspec, RubyGems package, or Rails rake task entrypoint yet.
acceptance_criteria: Add hxruby.gemspec and lib/hxruby entrypoints for the runtime; include rake tasks for hxruby:compile, hxruby:watch, hxruby:gen:model, and hxruby:gen:routes or document intentionally deferred tasks; add CI/package validation for the gem contents; document local build/install and Rails integration usage; ensure semantic-release or a documented release step keeps gem version metadata in sync with package.json/haxelib.json.
close_reason: Implemented hxruby gem packaging with gemspec, lib entrypoints, rake tasks, package validation, docs, and release asset wiring.

title: reflaxe.ruby 1.0
description: Root 1.0 delivery epic for the reflaxe.ruby compiler, runtime, Rails support, examples, and release hardening.
close_reason: Completed reflaxe.ruby 1.0 plan across M0-M7: compiler boot, core lowering, enums/switch/exceptions, std/runtime, Ruby interop, Rails MVP, generators, fixtures, strict policy, deterministic snapshots, CI/release hardening, and docs.

title: M0 Repo skeleton + compiler boot
description: Establish the flat repo layout, packaging metadata, bootstrap macros, compiler registration, and first smoke fixture.
close_reason: M0 repo skeleton and compiler boot completed: scaffold, build detection/context, bootstrap/init, compiler shell, and Reflaxe-driven hello_world smoke are implemented and npm test passes.

title: Scaffold repo skeleton, package metadata, and release/version-sync scripts
description: Create the baseline repo structure borrowed from the existing Reflaxe targets: package manifests, haxe_libraries entries, scripts, workflows, README/CHANGELOG placeholders, and extraParams wiring.
close_reason: Repo scaffold, package metadata, workflows, haxelib entries, and version-sync scripts added; npm test passes.

title: Implement Ruby build detection and build-context resolver
description: Add target detection that recognizes ruby_output, custom-target ruby, and delayed hxml defines, plus a build-context resolver for profile and strict-mode decisions.
close_reason: Added Ruby target detection, profile resolution, build context resolver, and Haxe compile probe; npm test passes.

title: Implement CompilerBootstrap and CompilerInit with classpath precedence
description: Add bootstrap/init macros that prepend std/_std, std, and vendor/reflaxe/src when appropriate, register the compiler, and gate Ruby-specific policy/setup.
close_reason: Added Ruby compiler bootstrap/init macros with target-gated classpath precedence and Reflaxe registration wiring; npm test passes.

title: Add Ruby compiler skeleton, output iterator, compilation context, and AST/printer shell
description: Create the minimal compiler modules needed to emit file-per-module Ruby output and support later lowering work.
close_reason: Added Ruby compiler shell, compilation context, AST/printer, output iterator, and compiler shell smoke check; npm test passes.

title: Add hello_world smoke fixture and runnable Ruby output check
description: Add the first fixture proving the compiler can emit runnable Ruby output through the new bootstrap and output pipeline.
close_reason: Added hello_world fixture, generated Ruby smoke output via Ruby AST/printer, Ruby execution check, and stdout comparison; npm test passes. Full Reflaxe-driven generation tracked in haxe.ruby-6nn.1.6.

title: Replace hello_world smoke with Reflaxe-driven generation
description: The current hello_world smoke verifies the Ruby AST/printer output surface and executes generated Ruby. Replace or extend it with a full Reflaxe compile once this repo has a compatible local Reflaxe vendor/lowering path, so the fixture proves bootstrap/init registration and file-per-module output end to end.
acceptance_criteria: hello_world compiles through reflaxe.ruby using -lib reflaxe.ruby or equivalent local classpaths; generated Ruby is executed with ruby; stdout matches the committed fixture expectation.
close_reason: Updated hello_world smoke to compile through reflaxe.ruby bootstrap/init using available vendored Reflaxe classpaths, execute generated Main.rb with ruby, and compare stdout; npm test passes.

title: M1 Core language subset
description: Deliver the first useful Ruby codegen pass for naming, control flow, classes, members, and lambdas.
close_reason: M1 core language subset completed: naming, core expression/control lowering, member/path emission, lambdas/function values, entrypoint wiring, executable smokes, and snapshots all pass npm test.

title: Implement RubyNaming and reserved-keyword escaping
description: Add Ruby naming rules for classes, modules, methods, locals, ivars, constants, and keyword-escape behavior.
close_reason: Added RubyNaming for locals, methods, ivars, constants, module paths, file stems, keyword escaping, and core constant collision protection; wired compiler type shells through naming; npm test passes.

title: Lower expressions, control flow, arrays, and hashes into Ruby AST
description: Support the core typed AST forms needed for conditionals, loops, literals, arrays, hashes, and basic statements/expressions.
close_reason: Added Ruby AST/printer nodes and compiler lowering for methods, statements, literals, locals, assignment, binary/unary ops, conditionals, while loops, arrays, hashes, casts, and Sys.print/println; added core_subset Reflaxe/Ruby smoke; npm test passes.

title: Emit modules, classes, methods, properties, statics, and file paths
description: Map Haxe packages and members to Ruby module/class structure, Ruby-friendly accessors, and stable Zeitwerk-compatible file paths.
close_reason: Added Ruby-safe module/class/member emission, static and instance accessors, simple static initializer fallback, static method/field call lowering, and Zeitwerk-shaped file path overrides; added class_members smoke; npm test passes.

title: Emit lambdas, function values, and non-Rails app entrypoint wiring
description: Lower Haxe function values to Ruby lambdas and finish the non-Rails entrypoint story for main/app emission.
close_reason: Added Ruby lambda lowering, function value calls, guarded direct main execution, generated run.rb entrypoint with app-file requires, and lambda_values smoke; npm test passes.

title: Add snapshot harness and M1 core fixtures
description: Stand up the primary snapshot test harness and seed it with core-language fixtures covering the M1 subset.
close_reason: Added M1 snapshot harness with update mode and seeded core_subset, class_members, and lambda_values Ruby snapshots; npm test passes.

title: M2 Enums + switch + exceptions
description: Add enum representation, switch lowering, and Haxe throw/catch semantics for Ruby output.
close_reason: M2 completed: enum Data.define ADTs, switch lowering, HxException throw/try/catch semantics, runtime fixtures, and snapshots all pass npm test.

title: Implement enum ADT emission with Ruby Data.define constructors
description: Represent Haxe enums as Ruby modules and Data.define-backed constructors with a stable runtime contract.
close_reason: Implemented enum module emission with Data.define constructors and Ruby < 3.2 compatibility shim, enum constructor call lowering, enum_adt executable smoke, and enum snapshots; npm test passes.

title: Implement switch lowering for enums and constant cases
description: Lower Haxe switch semantics to Ruby pattern matching and case/when without drifting from the typed source behavior.
close_reason: Implemented Ruby case/when lowering for constant switches and Haxe enum-index switches, added switch_cases executable fixture and snapshots; npm test passes.

title: Implement HxException runtime and throw/try/catch lowering
description: Preserve Haxe throw-anything semantics using an HxException wrapper and typed rescue/rethrow behavior.
close_reason: Implemented HxException runtime generation, throw lowering, try/catch rescue lowering with catch variable binding, exception_flow smoke, and snapshots; npm test passes.

title: Add enum, switch, and exception fixtures plus runtime tests
description: Add snapshot and runtime validation for enums, switch branches, and exception semantics before stdlib work begins.
close_reason: Added explicit M2 runtime gate plus enum_adt, switch_cases, and exception_flow executable fixtures/snapshots; npm run test:m2 and npm test pass.

title: M3 Stdlib MVP + hxruby runtime
description: Wire target-owned stdlib overrides, the hxruby runtime, and gap-report governance artifacts.
close_reason: Completed M3 stdlib MVP, hxruby runtime wiring, gap report, and runtime QA

title: Establish std versus std/_std ownership and Ruby stdlib inventory
description: Define which stdlib surfaces live in std, which overrides belong in std/_std, and record the initial supported/missing inventory for Ruby.
close_reason: Documented std/std/_std/runtime ownership, added Ruby stdlib inventory, README baselines, and inventory CI gate; npm test passes.

title: Implement runtime/hxruby core helpers
description: Add the minimal Ruby runtime for Std.string, reflection helpers, enum support, and exception plumbing.
close_reason: Implemented shared hxruby runtime helpers and compiler emission

title: Add stdlib MVP surfaces for Rails-oriented Haxe programs
description: Implement the first target-owned stdlib set needed for typical code and the Rails demo: Std, StringTools, Sys, Date, EReg, haxe.ds basics, and minimal haxe.io support.
close_reason: Implemented stdlib MVP surfaces, Ruby lowering, runtime helpers, and smoke coverage

title: Generate test/ruby_gap_report.json and add runtime/minitest coverage
description: Produce a checked JSON gap report for missing stdlib surfaces and cover the runtime with Ruby-side tests.
close_reason: Added checked ruby_gap_report and runtime minitest coverage

title: M4 Ruby interop
description: Support Ruby-native interop through require metadata, native mapping, symbols, kwargs, and block args.
close_reason: Completed M4 Ruby interop: requires, native mapping, symbols, kwargs, blocks, and ruby_interop coverage

title: Implement RequireRegistry and require/require_relative emission
description: Collect extern-driven require metadata and emit deterministic require and require_relative statements in generated Ruby.
close_reason: Implemented RequireRegistry, deterministic require emission, and interop smoke/snapshots

title: Implement @:native mapping and interop-aware naming rules
description: Support Ruby constant mapping and method renames without breaking target naming conventions.
close_reason: Implemented @:native type and field mapping with executable Ruby API coverage

title: Add Ruby Symbol and Kernel externs plus kwargs and block-arg lowering
description: Support Ruby symbols, keyword arguments, and metadata-driven block conversion needed for idiomatic interop.
close_reason: Added ruby.Symbol, Kernel externs, kwargs lowering, and block-arg lowering with executable coverage

title: Add ruby_interop example and interop snapshot coverage
description: Prove the interop surface through a dedicated example and snapshots for native mapping, requires, symbols, kwargs, and block args.
close_reason: Added combined ruby_interop example with executable smoke and snapshots

title: M5 Rails MVP + todoapp
description: Ship Rails-first compiler affordances, typed ActiveRecord and controller surfaces, and a runnable todo app.
close_reason: Completed Rails MVP: output path/autoload, typed ActiveRecord and ActionController surfaces, params/model macros, todoapp_rails fixture, snapshots, smoke tests, and compile-then-Rails integration harness.

title: Add Rails output-path and autoload affordances
description: Teach the compiler to target app/haxe_gen with Rails-friendly file paths, constant mapping, and autoload/eager-load assumptions.
close_reason: Added Rails mode output root, haxe_gen file paths, autoload initializer, and Rails snapshot/smoke coverage

title: Implement typed ActiveRecord surface and ModelMacro
description: Add std/rails/ActiveRecord.hx plus ModelMacro support for railsModel metadata, typed columns, and typed where/create operations.
close_reason: Added typed ActiveRecord surface, ModelMacro, Rails model lowering, and smoke/snapshot coverage

title: Implement typed ActionController surface and ParamsMacro
description: Add std/rails/ActionController.hx plus ParamsMacro support for require/permit expansion, snake_case keys, and controller helpers.
close_reason: Implemented typed ActionController surface, ParamsMacro require/permit expansion, Rails controller lowering, smoke/snapshot/gap coverage, and full npm test passes.

title: Build examples/todoapp_rails with Haxe-authored model/controller logic
description: Create the Rails todo app proving typed model/controller/params flow, manual route helpers where needed, and a migration template for the demo.
close_reason: Added examples/todoapp_rails model/controller/params flow, manual route helper, migration template, smoke test, snapshot coverage, and resolved Rails Base type collisions; npm test passes.

title: Add Rails integration tests and compile-then-rails-test CI flow
description: Run compiler output through a Rails test pass so the MVP is validated end to end.
close_reason: Added compile-then-Rails integration harness with generated Rails app materialization, Ruby syntax checks, optional strict Rails runtime execution via REQUIRE_RAILS, npm wiring, and full test coverage.

title: M6 Ergonomics + generators
description: Layer on typed associations, validation metadata, route generation, migration/scaffolding tooling, and emission polish.
close_reason: Completed M6 ergonomics and generators: model association/validation metadata, block/kwargs emission polish, routes helper generator, scaffold CLI, and regression fixtures/examples.

title: Extend ModelMacro for typed associations and validation metadata
description: Add belongs_to, has_many, has_one, and validation metadata handling on top of the Rails MVP model surface.
close_reason: Added typed ActiveRecord association/validation marker surfaces, ModelMacro metadata validation, Rails model DSL emission for belongs_to/has_many/has_one/validates, todoapp coverage, snapshots, and full npm test pass.

title: Improve idiomatic block and keyword-argument emission
description: Emit safer Ruby blocks and cleaner kwargs in the cases marked safe by metadata and interop rules.
close_reason: Improved safe block rendering and multiline raw expression indentation, expanded kwargs+block and symbol-array kwargs fixtures, refreshed snapshots, and full npm test passes.

title: Implement generator-based route helper task
description: Generate typed route-helper externs from rails routes into src_haxe/routes/Routes.hx rather than parsing the Rails DSL in the compiler.
close_reason: Added Rails routes-to-Haxe helper generator, generated todoapp Routes extern, switched controller to generated route helper, added generator smoke coverage, snapshots, and full npm test pass.

title: Add scaffolding CLI and/or hxruby rake tasks
description: Provide developer tooling for project creation, compile/watch flows, and model/route generation around the Ruby target.
close_reason: Added deterministic Rails scaffold CLI for Haxe model/controller/routes/migration/build skeletons, npm tooling, scaffold smoke test that compiles generated Haxe, and full npm test pass.

title: Add fixtures and examples for associations, validations, routes, and block idioms
description: Cover the new ergonomics and generator surfaces with dedicated examples and regression fixtures.
close_reason: Verified dedicated M6 coverage: todoapp association/validation/routes examples and snapshots, rails routes generator fixture, scaffold CLI compile fixture, and block/kwargs idiom smoke/snapshot coverage.

title: M7 1.0 hardening
description: Lock strict-mode policy, deterministic output, release/CI hardening, and end-user documentation for 1.0.
close_reason: Completed M7 hardening: strict raw-injection policy, deterministic snapshot stability, CI/release contracts, and user-facing docs/gap guidance.

title: Wire BoundaryEnforcer and StrictModeEnforcer
description: Enforce strict-example purity and optional strict-user boundaries for raw __ruby__ escape hatches, following the established Rust and Go patterns.
close_reason: Wired BoundaryEnforcer and StrictModeEnforcer for __ruby__ escape hatches, enabled strict examples in snapshots, added negative strict-boundary fixtures and CI smoke, and full npm test passes.

title: Make Ruby printer output deterministic and enforce snapshot stability
description: Stabilize printer formatting and add checks that prevent accidental snapshot churn or non-deterministic output.
close_reason: Normalized Ruby printer raw line endings, added snapshot CRLF/trailing-newline/path checks, double-compiled snapshot cases for deterministic output stability, and full npm test passes.

title: Expand CI matrix and release/version-sync hardening
description: Validate Ruby 3.2/3.3/4.0 and pinned Haxe builds, plus release/version-sync contracts for package metadata and artifacts.
close_reason: Expanded CI to Ruby 3.2/3.3/4.0 plus pinned Haxe 4.3.7, added release-contract metadata guard, fixed release assets, and full npm test passes.

title: Publish README, compatibility matrix, and gap-report guidance
description: Document target usage, supported features, remaining gaps, Rails workflow, and release readiness evidence for 1.0.
close_reason: Published current README, compatibility matrix, gap-report guidance, refreshed stdlib ownership notes, and verified release/gap/full test gates.

title: Add RailsHx model fields/f aliases for typed field refs
description: Expose generated model field refs through Todo.fields.title and Todo.f.title while keeping Todo.titleField as a compatibility alias. Update todoapp/docs/tests to prefer the nested fields/f API.
close_reason: Added Todo.fields/Todo.f typed field-ref aliases, updated RailsHx todoapp/docs/tests, and kept generated Rails output native.

title: Audit std helpers that can lower directly to idiomatic Ruby
description: Several std/Math and std/runtime helpers may delegate to HXRuby even when Ruby already has an equivalent receiver/module method, e.g. Math.abs -> value.abs. Audit similar cases and inline/direct-lower them when Ruby semantics match Haxe. Keep HXRuby helpers only where they encode Haxe-specific behavior, coercion/NaN/-0.0 edge cases, cross-version Ruby compatibility, or runtime reuse that materially improves correctness.

title: Implement std Array support
description: Add Ruby-backed Haxe Array API support with portable semantics where Ruby methods differ; update std inventory/gap reports and add smoke/snapshot coverage.
close_reason: Implemented Ruby-backed Array API lowering/runtime helpers for Haxe Array semantics, added stdlib smoke coverage, fixed increment/decrement statement lowering exposed by array comprehensions, refreshed snapshots, and updated std inventory/gap reports.

title: Adopt ruby_first profile naming
description: Make ruby_first the preferred public name for the Ruby-first profile while preserving idiomatic as a compatibility alias; update profile docs and agent guidance.
close_reason: Added ruby_first as the preferred Ruby profile spelling, kept idiomatic compatibility aliases, documented one-pipeline profile semantics, added profile resolver CI coverage, and updated snapshots after deterministic temp-id churn.

title: Promote typed Turbo client facade into RailsHx std
description: Move the sample-local client.railshx.Turbo facade into a reusable RailsHx/Haxe JS std surface. Provide typed lifecycle events, typed submit/form helpers, Turbo.visit options, and optional small DSLs where they improve app authoring over vanilla Rails/Turbo while still compiling to idiomatic Turbo usage.
close_reason: Promoted typed Turbo facade into std/rails/turbo/Turbo.hx, switched todoapp client to rails.turbo.Turbo, added client build std classpath, inventory entry, package archive coverage, and JS compile smoke.

title: Document Ruby profile contracts
description: Document the Ruby profile contract: portable is Haxe-semantics-first, idiomatic is Ruby-first, both should emit idiomatic Ruby where safe, and Ruby should not add a metal profile without a tested contract.
close_reason: Closed

title: RailsHx typed Rails compiler
description: Promote the current Rails MVP into a first-class RailsHx layer comparable in shape to haxe.elixir's Phoenix/Ecto integration: typed Rails std APIs, metadata registries, macro lowering, generators, docs, and real Rails integration tests. This remains one Ruby compiler pipeline using the ruby_first Rails-first contract, not a separate backend or metal profile.
acceptance_criteria: Open child tasks cover architecture/docs, ActiveRecord schema/query/associations/validations, migrations, controllers/params, routes, generators, integration tests, and framework docs.

title: Document RailsHx architecture contract
description: Write the canonical RailsHx architecture contract using ../haxe.elixir.codex Phoenix/Ecto as the implementation inspiration. Cover one Ruby compiler pipeline, ruby_first Rails-first default, portable domain code support, no metal profile, framework-owned typed std surfaces, macro registries/builders, generators, and Rails integration tests.
acceptance_criteria: Docs explain how RailsHx maps the haxe.elixir.codex pattern to Rails/ActiveRecord; AGENTS.md tells future agents to inspect ../haxe.elixir.codex Phoenix/Ecto implementation before designing RailsHx features; docs clearly distinguish current Rails MVP from target RailsHx.
close_reason: RailsHx roadmap doc and AGENTS guidance added; README and compatibility matrix now distinguish Rails MVP from RailsHx roadmap.

title: Write RailsHx guides and API references
description: Write RailsHx documentation comparable to haxe.elixir.codex Phoenix/Ecto guides: new Rails app, gradual adoption, ActiveRecord API, query DSL, migrations, controllers/params, routes, scaffold/generator workflow, strict boundary policy, and Rails-vs-portable authoring guidance.
acceptance_criteria: Docs include runnable examples, generated Ruby snippets, failure-mode notes, and links to official Rails concepts; docs explicitly point to ../haxe.elixir.codex Phoenix/Ecto implementation as the local inspiration for macro/registry/generator architecture.
notes: 2026-06-11: Documented local Ruby setup for RailsHx work. README now recommends rbenv, uses the repo .ruby-version pin, documents installing Rails 7.2.3.1/sqlite3 1.7.3, and explains REQUIRE_RAILS=1 for mandatory Rails runtime integration. Compatibility matrix now calls out the Ruby 3.3.x local development lane and Rails/sqlite prerequisite behavior. Verified with ci:release-contracts, REQUIRE_RAILS=1 npm run test:rails-integration, and npm run test:gem-package under rbenv Ruby 3.3.11.

title: Plan post-core RailsHx framework surfaces
description: Define follow-up RailsHx surfaces after the core ActiveRecord/controller/routes/migrations path is stable: ActionMailer, ActiveJob, ActionCable, ActiveStorage, ActionView/ViewComponent/Hotwire/Turbo, ActiveSupport instrumentation, and Rails plugin/engine affordances.
acceptance_criteria: A post-core roadmap exists with ordering, typed API boundaries, integration-test strategy, and explicit criteria for when each Rails component should graduate into implementation; core RailsHx tasks are not blocked by this expanded ecosystem scope.

title: Implement RailsHx typed ActionView template layer
description: Build a typed Rails template layer inspired by ../haxe.elixir.codex's HXX/HEEx implementation. Provide Haxe-authored typed templates/components that lower to Rails-native Action View artifacts and helpers rather than leaving app views as untyped ERB islands.
acceptance_criteria: Design and implement a RailsHx template DSL/API with typed assigns/locals, typed route/form/helper access where feasible, compile-time validation for field/assign references, generated Rails-native templates or renderable Ruby components, strict escape-hatch policy for raw ERB, docs comparing the approach to HXX/HEEx, and a todoapp sample using the typed template path.
notes: 2026-06-11: Added typed external Rails template interop via Template.external(path):Template<TLocals>. ViewMacro and HHX partial/component lowering now accept Template.external alongside Template.named, preserving typed locals checks while emitting normal Rails render calls and not owning/emitting the external ERB artifact. Added rails_interop_app proving Haxe->legacy ERB, Haxe->legacy Ruby externs, legacy ERB->generated HHX partials, and legacy ERB->generated Haxe service calls. Verified npm run test:rails-interop, REQUIRE_RAILS=1 npm run test:rails-interop under rbenv Ruby 3.3.11, npm run test:todoapp-rails, npm run test:stdlib-inventory, REQUIRE_RAILS=1 npm run test:rails-integration, npm run test:strict-boundaries, ci:version-sync, and ci:release-contracts.

title: Design typed RailsHx component/slot authoring API
description: Continue the typed ActionView layer beyond Rails layout slots. Study ../haxe.elixir.codex HXX component/slot examples, then design and implement a RailsHx component/slot authoring surface for reusable typed view components/partials without raw ERB.
acceptance_criteria: RailsHx has documented typed component/slot authoring ergonomics for reusable templates; canonical examples use HHX and typed locals/slots; compiler/lowerer tests cover valid and invalid component/slot usage; raw ERB remains an explicit escape hatch only.
close_reason: Implemented Rails-native typed component slot primitive: Slot.content marker, <component> HHX tag, HtmlNode/H/compiler lowering to capture + render partial locals, todoapp card component sample, docs/AGENTS guidance, package/inventory/smoke/snapshot coverage, and invalid Slot.content usage test.

title: Make RailsHx template references compile-time checked
description: Replace unchecked RailsHx template path strings with compile-time checked template references where possible. Validate Template.named, Template.external path shape, @:railsTemplate paths, and layout names against RailsHx-owned template classes/generated artifacts or explicit external-template declarations.
acceptance_criteria: RailsHx-owned missing/renamed partial/template references fail at Haxe compile time; external templates remain explicit through Template.external and validate safe path shape; todoapp uses typed template/layout references where available; negative tests cover missing template, wrong locals, and unsafe path cases.
close_reason: Implemented checked RailsHx template references with Template.of/layout/existing, path validation, sample conversions, docs, generator update, and negative tests.

title: Centralize RailsHx DOM hooks and slot names as typed constants
description: Add typed constants/abstracts for behavior-bearing HHX/JS hooks such as content slots, data-railshx attributes, IDs, selectors, and repeated CSS class hooks in todoapp and future RailsHx samples.
acceptance_criteria: Todoapp behavior hooks shared by HHX, Haxe JS, and Playwright are centralized; slot names use typed values where supported; generated HTML remains unchanged; tests prove renamed hooks fail in one place instead of drifting silently.

title: Implement RailsHx ActiveRecord schema registry
description: Expand the current rails.active_record.Base<T> and ModelMacro seed into a schema metadata registry inspired by haxe.elixir.codex's Ecto SchemaRegistrar. Support typed columns, inferred/default table names, nullability, defaults, timestamps, indexes, primary keys, and Rails-friendly snake_case lowering.
acceptance_criteria: Model metadata is collected at compile time; invalid column metadata fails compilation; generated Ruby model classes preserve Rails ApplicationRecord shape; tests cover table inference, explicit table names, columns, nullability, defaults, timestamps, and invalid metadata.
notes: 2026-06-10: Implemented RailsHx ActiveRecord schema-registry slice. Added typed ColumnOptions<T>, railsColumn option validation, generated Model.__hx_rails_schema metadata, explicit/inferred table fixtures, invalid defaultValue compile check, docs/inventory/matrix updates, and refreshed snapshots. Completed Rails superclass policy by emitting models as ::ApplicationRecord and materializing app/models/application_record.rb in the integration harness; npm test passes.
close_reason: Implemented ActiveRecord schema registry metadata with validated typed columns and Rails-native ::ApplicationRecord superclass output; npm test passes.

title: Implement RailsHx typed ActiveRecord relation and query DSL
description: Add a typed ActiveRecord query layer inspired by haxe.elixir.codex's Ecto TypedQuery. Provide Relation<T> and typed helpers for where, find, findBy, order, limit, includes, joins, scopes, and chaining while lowering to idiomatic Rails ActiveRecord calls.
acceptance_criteria: Object-literal query keys are checked against model columns/associations; value types are checked; Relation<T> chains preserve model type; generated Ruby uses Rails-native query methods; negative tests cover unknown fields and wrong value types.

title: Implement RailsHx typed associations, validations, enums, and callbacks
description: Extend ModelMacro/registry beyond metadata validation into typed ActiveRecord relationship and lifecycle surfaces. Use haxe.elixir.codex's Ecto association validator as inspiration for compile-time model shape validation, adapted to Rails association names, foreign keys, dependent options, validations, enums, and callbacks.
acceptance_criteria: Belongs-to/has-many/has-one/through metadata validates target model and FK shape when resolvable; Rails validations/enums/callbacks have typed wrappers; generated Ruby emits idiomatic Rails macros; warnings/errors have strict and escape-hatch policy documented and tested.

title: Implement RailsHx typed migration DSL and generator
description: Build Haxe-authored Rails migrations inspired by haxe.elixir.codex's Ecto Migration, MigrationBuilder, MigrationRegistry, and MigrationValidator. Emit standard ActiveRecord::Migration Ruby files while validating tables, columns, indexes, foreign keys, reversible operations, timestamps, and migration ordering where practical.
acceptance_criteria: A Haxe migration DSL emits timestamped Rails migration files; invalid table/column/index references fail or warn by documented policy; generated migrations run with rails db:migrate in the integration app; tests cover create/alter/drop tables, indexes, foreign keys, timestamps, rollback shape, and deterministic file names.
notes: Implemented initial RailsHx migration artifact slice: Haxe-authored @:railsMigration classes emit timestamped ActiveRecord create-table migrations from referenced @:railsModel/@:railsColumn metadata, including timestamps, defaults/nullability, indexes, and belongs_to references. Todoapp and scaffold generator now use Haxe migration source; generated db/migrate/*.rb is compiler output. Remaining work: richer typed migration DSL for alter/drop/reversible operations, validation, ordering, rollback shape, and broader negative tests.

title: Implement RailsHx typed controllers, params, and action results
description: Expand the current ActionController Base/ParamsMacro seed into typed Rails controller surfaces inspired by haxe.elixir.codex's Phoenix controller/socket/assign abstractions. Cover strong params from typedefs/model schemas, render/redirect/head result shapes, session, flash, cookies, request, response, filters, and narrow dynamic boundaries.
acceptance_criteria: Controller APIs use typed Haxe params/results while lowering to Rails ActionController idioms; ParamsMacro supports typedef-driven permit lists with snake_case lowering; tests cover required/optional params, nested params, render/json/redirect/head, filters, flash/session/cookies, and invalid permit fields.

title: Make RailsHx form fields and strong params derive from typed model/schema fields
description: Remove duplicated string field names across RailsHx HHX form helpers and ParamsMacro.requirePermit by adding typed model/schema field references or checked field-name macros that lower to Rails snake_case strings/symbols.
acceptance_criteria: Todo form field names and strong params can be authored through typed model/schema field references; unknown fields fail at compile time; generated Rails output remains idiomatic field names and permitted params; negative tests cover unknown fields and wrong model scope.
close_reason: Implemented typed RailsHx ActiveRecord field refs/model params keys for HHX forms and ParamsMacro, with unknown-field and mixed-model negative coverage.

title: Implement RailsHx route helper sync and later Haxe-first routing DSL
description: Harden the existing rails routes parser into a typed route helper sync, then design an optional Haxe-first routes DSL inspired by haxe.elixir.codex's Phoenix RouterDsl. Start with generated extern helpers from Rails-owned config/routes.rb; only add Haxe-owned route emission after helper sync is deterministic and tested.
acceptance_criteria: rails routes output generates typed path/url externs with required path params; helpers preserve Rails names while exposing Haxe-friendly method names; parser handles resources, member/collection routes, namespaces, nested params, and engines where feasible; docs mark Haxe-first route emission as phase 2.
close_reason: Hardened RailsHx route helper sync from Rails-owned rails routes output. Parser now handles carried resource prefixes, namespaces, member/collection helpers, nested resource params, multi-verb routes, optional segments, glob params, duplicate helper prefixes, mount-like rows, and internal rails_* skips. Added complex fixture coverage and docs clarifying Haxe-owned route emission remains deferred.

title: Implement RailsHx generators, rake tasks, and app adoption tooling
description: Turn the current scripts/rails seeds into RailsHx adoption tooling inspired by haxe.elixir.codex's project/scaffold generators and docs. Provide install, compile/watch, model, controller, migration, scaffold, and route-sync commands through npm scripts and/or hxruby rake tasks/gem entrypoints.
acceptance_criteria: A Rails app can install hxruby integration, compile Haxe-owned app code, generate typed models/controllers/migrations/scaffolds, sync routes, and run the generated app without hand-editing generated internals; commands have docs and tests/smokes.
notes: 2026-06-11: Added the initial RailsHx mixed adoption sample at examples/rails_interop_app and npm run test:rails-interop. The sample documents the quick Rails PoC -> typed Haxe wrapper -> gradual HHX migration path and keeps external Ruby/ERB as Rails-owned source. Filed haxe.ruby-wpi.8.1 for future adoption generator scaffolding of externs and Template.external locals wrappers.

title: Add RailsHx adoption generator for existing Ruby/ERB boundaries
description: Build generator support for existing Rails apps that scans or accepts Ruby service/helper/template names and scaffolds typed Haxe externs plus Template.external locals typedefs. This follows the mixed rails_interop_app contract: Rails-owned Ruby/ERB stays source, Haxe consumes it through typed boundaries, and generated Haxe output remains normal Rails artifacts.
acceptance_criteria: A Rails app can run an adoption command to create typed extern/template wrapper stubs for selected existing Ruby/ERB boundaries; generated stubs compile; docs show the PoC-to-typed-wrapper workflow; smoke coverage proves the generator does not overwrite external ERB source.
close_reason: Implemented Ruby-native RailsHx adoption generator for explicit existing Ruby/ERB boundaries. Added typed service extern and Template.external wrapper scaffolding, npm/rake entrypoints, gem packaging, docs, and smoke coverage proving generated wrappers compile and Rails-owned ERB is not overwritten. Filed haxe.ruby-wpi.8.2 for Rails::Generators integration and smarter discovery.

title: Add RailsHx Rails::Generators integration and adoption discovery
description: Promote the Ruby-native RailsHx generator modules into Rails::Generators-compatible commands and add safer discovery/introspection for existing Ruby/ERB boundaries. Keep the current explicit npm/rake wrappers as stable entrypoints, but make installed Rails apps feel first-class via normal rails generate UX.
acceptance_criteria: Installed Rails apps can run rails generate hxruby:* commands for app install, route sync, scaffold, and adopt; adoption discovery can propose wrappers for selected services/templates without overwriting Rails-owned ERB/Ruby; docs and smokes cover both rake and rails generate entrypoints.
close_reason: Implemented Rails generator adapters for hxruby:install, hxruby:routes, hxruby:scaffold, and hxruby:adopt over the Ruby generator core. Added suggest-only adopt discovery, no-Rails plus optional real-Rails smoke coverage, gem packaging assertions, and docs for Rails-style generator UX. Filed haxe.ruby-wpi.8.3 for deferred signature inference.

title: Add RailsHx adoption signature inference for Ruby boundaries
description: Extend RailsHx adoption tooling beyond suggest-only discovery by inferring starter method signatures for selected existing Ruby services/helpers where safe. Keep generated externs conservative and require explicit user-selected boundaries; do not overwrite Rails-owned Ruby/ERB.
acceptance_criteria: Adoption tooling can inspect selected Ruby constants and generate starter Haxe extern method signatures with conservative Dynamic/known scalar types; ambiguous methods are marked TODO instead of guessed unsafely; docs and smokes cover inferred, ambiguous, and no-overwrite cases.

title: Add RailsHx end-to-end Rails integration app and CI gate
description: Create a RailsHx integration app/test gate that proves Haxe-authored Rails models, migrations, controllers, params, routes, and generated Ruby run in Rails. Mirror haxe.elixir.codex's end-to-end Phoenix/Ecto examples and sentinel tests, adapted to Rails db:migrate and rails test.
acceptance_criteria: CI can compile the Haxe Rails app, materialize generated Ruby, run Rails migrations, and execute Rails integration tests when Rails gems are available or REQUIRE_RAILS=1; local skips remain explicit; failures identify compiler vs Rails runtime stage.
notes: Hardened RailsHx Playwright browser gate: added dedicated GitHub Actions RailsHx browser sentinel job, release-contract assertions for the job/script, runner port conflict handling/free-port fallback, Chromium cache detection, signal cleanup/server-log reporting, and UX regression assertions for broken links/back-to-todos artifacts plus todo-dot containment. Verified npm test and npm run test:todoapp-playwright pass.
